description_long: This is a modern, boxy urban house with a flat roof and three visible stories. The facade is minimalist, painted in a uniform white, with simple rectangular windows arranged in neat horizontal rows. The ground floor features a recessed entry door on the left and large glass storefront-style windows, suggesting a possible mixed-use or live-work space. The side and rear elevations are plain, with no windows or decorative elements, emphasizing a utilitarian design. The roof has a small raised section and a recessed area, possibly for mechanical equipment or a rooftop terrace. The house sits flush with a sidewalk, with two small circular green patches suggesting minimal landscaping.
description: A modern, minimalist three-story urban house with a flat roof, white facade, and symmetrical window rows. The ground floor features large glass windows and a simple entry door.
description_view_0: Front view showing three stories, symmetrical windows, a recessed entry door, and large ground-floor glass windows.
description_view_1: Left side view revealing a plain wall with no windows and a small door at the rear.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a completely blank wall with no windows or doors.
description_view_3: Right side view, also plain, with a small door at the rear and minimal landscaping.
attribute_entryway_design: Simple flush entry door with no steps or porch, adjacent to large glass windows, minimal decorative elements.
